case_title: FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS, VS. NOE RASHEED ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS, A CALIFORNIA NON PROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RASHEED, NOE BRASH, AMBER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 835 TURK STREET UNIT #414 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73453908)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIVE KEYS SCHOOLS AND PROGRAMS, A CALIFORNIA NON PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT RASHEED, NOE BRASH, AMBER DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
